VBA MACRO Foglio1.cls 
in file: MONOFUNI.xls - OLE stream: '_VBA_PROJECT_CUR/VBA/Foglio1'
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - 


Private Sub fpt_setup_Click()
Dim j, kk, rr, cc1, cc2 As Integer
Dim testo As Variant

j = Sheets("F01").Fune_Portante.ListIndex
If j > 0 Then
      testo = Sheets("ROPE_1").Cells(10 + j, 2)
      If IsNumeric(testo) Then
                              'scelta fune
                              rr = 10 + j
                              For kk = rr To 10 Step -1
                                                      testo = Sheets("ROPE_1").Cells(kk, 2)
                                                      If Not IsNumeric(testo) Then Exit For
                              Next kk
                              If Sheets("F01").fpt_1770 Then cc1 = 6: cc2 = 9
                              If Sheets("F01").fpt_1960 Then cc1 = 7: cc2 = 10
                              If Sheets("F01").fpt_2160 Then cc1 = 8: cc2 = 11
                              'assegna i valori
                              Sheets("F01").Cells(7, 4) = testo
                              Sheets("F01").Cells(8, 5) = Sheets("ROPE_1").Cells(rr, 2)
                              Sheets("F01").Cells(9, 5) = Sheets("ROPE_1").Cells(rr, 3)
                              Sheets("F01").Cells(10, 5) = Sheets("ROPE_1").Cells(rr, 4)
                              Sheets("F01").Cells(11, 5) = Sheets("ROPE_1").Cells(rr, 5)
                              Sheets("F01").Cells(12, 5) = Sheets("ROPE_1").Cells(rr, cc1)
                              Sheets("F01").Cells(12, 7) = Sheets("ROPE_1").Cells(rr, cc2)
                              
      End If
End If
End Sub

Private Sub fs_setup_Click()
Dim j, kk, rr, cc1, cc2 As Integer
Dim testo As Variant

j = Sheets("F01").Fune_Segnalazione.ListIndex
If j > 0 Then
      testo = Sheets("ROPE_3").Cells(10 + j, 2)
      If IsNumeric(testo) Then
                              'scelta fune
                              rr = 10 + j
                              For kk = rr To 10 Step -1
                                                      testo = Sheets("ROPE_3").Cells(kk, 2)
                                                      If Not IsNumeric(testo) Then Exit For
                              Next kk
                              cc1 = 7: cc2 = 10
                              'assegna i valori
                              Sheets("F01").Cells(23, 4) = testo
                              Sheets("F01").Cells(24, 5) = Sheets("ROPE_3").Cells(rr, 2)
                              Sheets("F01").Cells(25, 5) = Sheets("ROPE_3").Cells(rr, 3)
                              Sheets("F01").Cells(26, 5) = Sheets("ROPE_3").Cells(rr, 4)
                              Sheets("F01").Cells(28, 5) = Sheets("ROPE_3").Cells(rr, cc1)
                              Sheets("F01").Cells(28, 7) = Sheets("ROPE_3").Cells(rr, cc2)
                              
      End If
End If

End Sub

Private Sub ft_setup_Click()
Dim j, kk, rr, cc1, cc2 As Integer
Dim testo As Variant

j = Sheets("F01").Fune_Tenditrice.ListIndex
If j > 0 Then
      testo = Sheets("ROPE_2").Cells(10 + j, 2)
      If IsNumeric(testo) Then
                              'scelta fune
                              rr = 10 + j
                              For kk = rr To 10 Step -1
                                                      testo = Sheets("ROPE_2").Cells(kk, 2)
                                                      If Not IsNumeric(testo) Then Exit For
                              Next kk
                              cc1 = 7: cc2 = 10
                              'assegna i valori
                              Sheets("F01").Cells(15, 4) = testo
                              Sheets("F01").Cells(16, 5) = Sheets("ROPE_2").Cells(rr, 2)
                              Sheets("F01").Cells(17, 5) = Sheets("ROPE_2").Cells(rr, 3)
                              Sheets("F01").Cells(18, 5) = Sheets("ROPE_2").Cells(rr, 4)
                              Sheets("F01").Cells(19, 5) = Sheets("ROPE_2").Cells(rr, 5)
                              Sheets("F01").Cells(20, 5) = Sheets("ROPE_2").Cells(rr, cc1)
                              Sheets("F01").Cells(20, 7) = Sheets("ROPE_2").Cells(rr, cc2)
                              
      End If
End If

End Sub



Private Sub Image1_Click()
    Sheets("MENU").Select
    Sheets("MENU").Cells(50, 1).Select
End Sub

VBA MACRO Foglio8.cls 
in file: MONOFUNI.xls - OLE stream: '_VBA_PROJECT_CUR/VBA/Foglio8'
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - 

Private Sub del_rigaprof_Click()

      Dim j, k As Integer
      
      If cek_ins_del Then
              For j = numriga To 1113
                     Cells(j, numcolonna + 1) = Cells(j + 1, numcolonna + 1)
                     Cells(j, numcolonna + 2) = Cells(j + 1, numcolonna + 2)
                     Cells(j, numcolonna + 3) = Cells(j + 1, numcolonna + 3)
                     'mezzecoste
                     Cells(j, 12) = Cells(j + 1, 12)
                     Cells(j, 13) = Cells(j + 1, 13)
              Next j
      Else
          Beep
          If Sheets("HOME").flag_italiano Then
                                              testo1 = Sheets("F02").Cells(1213, 2)
          Else
                testo1 = Sheets("F02").Cells(1228, 2)
          End If
          MsgBox (testo1)
      End If

End Sub


Private Sub del_rigaprof_d_Click()

      Dim j, k As Integer
      If cek_ins_del_d Then
              For j = numriga To 1113
                     Cells(j, numcolonna + 1) = Cells(j + 1, numcolonna + 1)
                     Cells(j, numcolonna + 2) = Cells(j + 1, numcolonna + 2)
                     Cells(j, numcolonna + 3) = Cells(j + 1, numcolonna + 3)
                     'mezzecoste
                     Cells(j, 14) = Cells(j + 1, 14)
                     Cells(j, 15) = Cells(j + 1, 15)
              Next j
      Else
          Beep
          If Sheets("HOME").flag_italiano Then
                                              testo1 = Sheets("F02").Cells(1213, 2)
          Else
                testo1 = Sheets("F02").Cells(1228, 2)
          End If
          MsgBox (testo1)
      End If

End Sub

Private Sub Image1_Click()
        Sheets("MENU").Select
        Sheets("MENU").Cells(50, 1).Select
End Sub

Private Sub ins_rigaprof_Click()
      
      Dim j, k As Integer
      
      If cek_ins_del Then
              For j = 1114 To numriga + 1 Step -1
                     Cells(j, numcolonna + 1) = Cells(j - 1, numcolonna + 1)
                     Cells(j, numcolonna + 2) = Cells(j - 1, numcolonna + 2)
                     Cells(j, numcolonna + 3) = Cells(j - 1, numcolonna + 3)
                     'mezzecoste
                     Cells(j, 12) = Cells(j - 1, 12)
                     Cells(j, 13) = Cells(j - 1, 13)
              Next j
              Cells(numriga, numcolonna + 1) = ""
              Cells(numriga, numcolonna + 2) = ""
              Cells(numriga, numcolonna + 3) = ""
              'mezzecoste
              Cells(numriga, 12) = ""
              Cells(numriga, 13) = ""
      Else
          Beep
          If Sheets("HOME").flag_italiano Then
                                              testo1 = Sheets("F02").Cells(1213, 2)
          Else
                testo1 = Sheets("F02").Cells(1228, 2)
          End If
          MsgBox (testo1)
      End If

End Sub

Private Sub ins_rigaprof_d_Click()

      Dim j, k As Integer
      
      If cek_ins_del_d Then
              For j = 1114 To numriga + 1 Step -1
                     Cells(j, numcolonna + 1) = Cells(j - 1, numcolonna + 1)
                     Cells(j, numcolonna + 2) = Cells(j - 1, numcolonna + 2)
                     Cells(j, numcolonna + 3) = Cells(j - 1, numcolonna + 3)
                     'mezzecoste
                     Cells(j, 14) = Cells(j - 1, 14)
                     Cells(j, 15) = Cells(j - 1, 15)
              Next j
              Cells(numriga, numcolonna + 1) = ""
              Cells(numriga, numcolonna + 2) = ""
              Cells(numriga, numcolonna + 3) = ""
              'mezzecoste
              Cells(numriga, 14) = ""
              Cells(numriga, 15) = ""
      Else
          Beep
          If Sheets("HOME").flag_italiano Then
                                              testo1 = Sheets("F02").Cells(1213, 2)
          Else
                testo1 = Sheets("F02").Cells(1228, 2)
          End If
          MsgBox (testo1)
      End If

End Sub

Private Sub Svuota_prof_Click()
         Dim result As Integer
         
         If Sheets("HOME").flag_italiano.value Then
                testomes = Sheets("F02").Cells(1214, 2)
         Else
                testomes = Sheets("F02").Cells(1229, 2)
         End If
         result = MsgBox(testomes, 52, "Warning")
         If result <> 6 Then Exit Sub
         nomefoglio = "F02"
         Call elimina_profilo_salita(nomefoglio)
End Sub

Private Sub svuota_prof_d_Click()
         Dim result As Integer
         
         If Sheets("HOME").flag_italiano.value Then
                testomes = Sheets("F02").Cells(1214, 7)
         Else
                testomes = Sheets("F02").Cells(1229, 7)
         End If
         result = MsgBox(testomes, 52, "Warning")
         If result <> 6 Then Exit Sub
         nomefoglio = "F02"
         Call elimina_profilo_discesa(nomefoglio)
End Sub

Private Sub vedi_profilo_discesa_Click()
        Call Set_Ground_Profile
        Sheets("F02").Cells(57, 23).Select
End Sub

Private Sub vedi_profilo_salita_Click()
        Call Set_Ground_Profile
        Sheets("F02").Cells(15, 23).Select
End Sub

Private Sub Worksheet_SelectionChange(ByVal Target As Excel.Range)
       
       On Local Error GoTo err_range
       Dim testo1, testo2, test3, testo4 As String
       
       numsost = Target.value
       numriga = Val(Target.Row)
       numcolonna = Val(Target.Column)
       If Sheets("HOME").flag_italiano.value Then
                                                testo1 = Sheets("F02").Cells(1206, 2)
                                                testo2 = Sheets("F02").Cells(1207, 2)
       Else
                testo1 = Sheets("F02").Cells(1221, 2)
                testo2 = Sheets("F02").Cells(1222, 2)
       End If
       
       If (numriga > 14 And numriga < 1113) And (numcolonna = 2 Or numcolonna = 7) Then
           If numcolonna = 2 Then
             test_riga.Caption = "< Riga =" + Str(numsost) + " > " + testo1
             cek_ins_del = True
             test_riga_d.Caption = testo2
           Else
             test_riga_d.Caption = "< Riga =" + Str(numsost) + " > " + testo1
             cek_ins_del_d = True
             test_riga.Caption = testo2
           End If
       Else
            test_riga.Caption = testo2
            test_riga_d.Caption = testo2
            cek_ins_del = False
            cek_ins_del_d = False
       End If
       Exit Sub
       
err_range:
          Beep
          If Sheets("HOME").flag_italiano Then
                                              testo1 = Sheets("F02").Cells(1212, 2)
          Else
                testo1 = Sheets("F02").Cells(1227, 2)
          End If
          MsgBox (testo1)
          Exit Sub
End Sub

VBA MACRO Linea.cls 
in file: MONOFUNI.xls - OLE stream: '_VBA_PROJECT_CUR/VBA/Linea'
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - 




Private Sub crea_relativi_Click()
       Dim j, k, w, Z As Integer
       
       
       nomefoglio = "F03"
       Call elimina_F04(nomefoglio)

       'controlla profilo terreno ramo salita
       nbs = 1
       w = 15
       j = 4
       k = 5
       p_terr = Sheets("F02").Cells(w, j)
       q_terr = Sheets("F02").Cells(w, k)
       While (p_terr + q_terr) <> 0
                  nbs = nbs + 1
                  w = w + 1
                  p_terr = Sheets("F02").Cells(w, j)
                  q_terr = Sheets("F02").Cells(w, k)
       Wend
       If nbs < 2 Then nbs = 0
       'controlla profilo terreno ramo discesa
       nbd = 1
       w = 15
       j = 9
       k = 10
       p_terr = Sheets("F02").Cells(w, j)
       q_terr = Sheets("F02").Cells(w, k)
       While (p_terr + q_terr) <> 0
                  nbd = nbd + 1
                  w = w + 1
                  p_terr = Sheets("F02").Cells(w, j)
                  q_terr = Sheets("F02").Cells(w, k)
       Wend
       If nbd < 2 Then nbd = nbs
             
       'ramo salita
       k = 1
       nc(k) = 0
       If Sheets("F03").Cells(15, 4) = 0 And Sheets("F03").Cells(15, 7) = 0 Then
                           Beep
                           MsgBox ("Mancanza Dati : verificare!")
                           Exit Sub
       Else
             nomesost(k, 1) = Sheets("F03").Cells(15, 3)
             progsost(k, 1) = Sheets("F03").Cells(15, 4)
             quotasost(k, 1) = Sheets("F03").Cells(15, 7)
             Sheets("F04").Cells(6, 5) = progsost(k, 1)
             Sheets("F04").Cells(7, 5) = quotasost(k, 1)
       End If
       w = 15
       j = 1
       cek_pr = Val(Sheets("F03").Cells(w + 1, 4))
       cek_qp = Val(Sheets("F03").Cells(w + 1, 7))
       cek_tot = cek_pr + cek_qp
       While cek_tot <> 0
             w = w + 1
             j = j + 1
             nomesost(k, j) = Sheets("F03").Cells(w, 3)
             progsost(k, j) = Sheets("F03").Cells(w, 4)
             quotasost(k, j) = Sheets("F03").Cells(w, 7)
             nomecamp(k, j - 1) = nomesost(k, j - 1) + "-" + nomesost(k, j)
             Lorizz(k, j - 1) = progsost(k, j) - progsost(k, j - 1)
             Disliv(k, j - 1) = quotasost(k, j) - quotasost(k, j - 1)
             Corda(k, j - 1) = Sqr(Lorizz(k, j - 1) ^ 2 + Disliv(k, j - 1) ^ 2)
             Sheets("F04").Cells(w - 1, 3) = nomecamp(k, j - 1)
             Sheets("F04").Cells(w - 1, 4) = Lorizz(k, j - 1)
             Sheets("F04").Cells(w - 1, 5) = Disliv(k, j - 1)
             nc(k) = nc(k) + 1
             cek_pr = Val(Sheets("F03").Cells(w + 1, 4))
             cek_qp = Val(Sheets("F03").Cells(w + 1, 7))
             cek_tot = cek_pr + cek_qp
      Wend
      For j = w To 94
        For Z = 3 To 5
             Sheets("F04").Cells(j, Z) = ""
        Next Z
      Next j
      
       'ramo discesa
       k = 2
       nc(k) = 0
       If Sheets("F03").Cells(15, 11) = 0 And Sheets("F03").Cells(15, 14) = 0 Then
                           'ramo discesa = ramo salita salita
                           nc(2) = nc(1)
                           For j = 1 To nc(2)
                                 nomesost(2, j) = nomesost(1, j)
                                 progsost(2, j) = progsost(1, j)
                                 quotasost(2, j) = quotasost(1, j)
                                 If j > 1 Then
                                      nomecamp(2, j - 1) = nomecamp(1, j - 1)
                                      Lorizz(2, j - 1) = Lorizz(1, j - 1)
                                      Disliv(2, j - 1) = Disliv(1, j - 1)
                                      Corda(2, j - 1) = Corda(1, j - 1)
                                 End If
                           Next j
       Else
             nomesost(k, 1) = Sheets("F03").Cells(15, 10)
             progsost(k, 1) = Sheets("F03").Cells(15, 11)
             quotasost(k, 1) = Sheets("F03").Cells(15, 14)
             Sheets("F04").Cells(6, 5) = progsost(k, 1)
             Sheets("F04").Cells(7, 5) = quotasost(k, 1)
       End If
       w = 15
       j = 1
       While Val(Sheets("F03").Cells(w + 1, 11)) <> 0 And Val(Sheets("F03").Cells(w + 1, 14)) <> 0
             w = w + 1
             j = j + 1
             nomesost(k, j) = Sheets("F03").Cells(w, 10)
             progsost(k, j) = Sheets("F03").Cells(w, 11)
             quotasost(k, j) = Sheets("F03").Cells(w, 14)
             nomecamp(k, j - 1) = nomesost(k, j - 1) + "-" + nomesost(k, j)
             Lorizz(k, j - 1) = progsost(k, j) - progsost(k, j - 1)
             Disliv(k, j - 1) = quotasost(k, j) - quotasost(k, j - 1)
             Corda(k, j - 1) = Sqr(Lorizz(k, j - 1) ^ 2 + Disliv(k, j - 1) ^ 2)
             Sheets("F04").Cells(w - 1, 7) = nomecamp(k, j - 1)
             Sheets("F04").Cells(w - 1, 8) = Lorizz(k, j - 1)
             Sheets("F04").Cells(w - 1, 9) = Disliv(k, j - 1)
             nc(k) = nc(k) + 1
      Wend
      For j = w To 94
        For Z = 7 To 9
             Sheets("F04").Cells(j, Z) = ""
        Next Z
      Next j
      
      'calcolo delle quote terreno ed altezze verticali sostegni
      'salita
      If nbs > 0 Then
        For j = 1 To nc(1) + 1
                   w = 15
                   While Sheets("F02").Cells(w, 4) < progsost(1, j)
                           p_terr = Sheets("F02").Cells(w, 4)
                           q_terr = Sheets("F02").Cells(w, 5)
                           p_terrs = Sheets("F02").Cells(w + 1, 4)
                           q_terrs = Sheets("F02").Cells(w + 1, 5)
                           w = w + 1
                   Wend
                   If p_terr = progsost(1, j) Then
                                         Sheets("F03").Cells(14 + j, 6) = q_terr
                                         Sheets("F03").Cells(14 + j, 7) = quotasost(1, j) - q_terr
                   Else
                        p_delta = p_terrs - p_terr
                        q_delta = q_terrs - q_terr
                        q_terrpalo = q_terr + (progsost(1, j) - p_terr) * q_delta / p_delta
                        Sheets("F03").Cells(14 + j, 5) = q_terrpalo
                        Sheets("F03").Cells(14 + j, 6) = quotasost(1, j) - q_terrpalo
                   End If
        Next j
      End If
      'calcolo delle quote terreno ed altezze verticali sostegni
      'discesa
      If nbd > 0 Then
         If nc(1) <> nc(2) Then
            For j = 1 To nc(2) + 1
                   w = 15
                   While Sheets("F02").Cells(w, 4) < progsost(2, j)
                           p_terr = Sheets("F02").Cells(w, 9)
                           q_terr = Sheets("F02").Cells(w, 10)
                           p_terrs = Sheets("F02").Cells(w + 1, 9)
                           q_terrs = Sheets("F02").Cells(w + 1, 10)
                           w = w + 1
                   Wend
                   If p_terr = progsost(2, j) Then
                                         Sheets("F03").Cells(14 + j, 12) = q_terr
                                         Sheets("F03").Cells(14 + j, 13) = quotasost(1, j) - q_terr
                   Else
                        p_delta = p_terrs - p_terr
                        q_delta = q_terrs - q_terr
                        q_terrpalo = q_terr + (progsost(2, j) - p_terr) * q_delta / p_delta
                        Sheets("F03").Cells(14 + j, 12) = q_terrpalo
                        Sheets("F03").Cells(14 + j, 13) = quotasost(2, j) - q_terrpalo
                   End If
            Next j
         End If
      End If
      Sheets("F04").Select
      Sheets("F04").Range("C15").Select

End Sub

Private Sub elimina_Click()

      Dim j, k As Integer
If (numcolonna = 2 Or numcolonna = 9) And numriga > 14 Then
      If cek_ins_del Then
              For j = numriga To 93
                     Cells(j, numcolonna + 1) = Cells(j + 1, numcolonna + 1)
                     Cells(j, numcolonna + 2) = Cells(j + 1, numcolonna + 2)
                     Cells(j, numcolonna + 3) = Cells(j + 1, numcolonna + 3)
                     Cells(j, numcolonna + 4) = Cells(j + 1, numcolonna + 4)
                     Cells(j, numcolonna + 5) = Cells(j + 1, numcolonna + 5)
                     Cells(j, numcolonna + 6) = Cells(j + 1, numcolonna + 6)
              Next j
      Else
          Beep
          MsgBox ("DELETE ROW : TO BE A FAILURE")
      End If
Else
          Beep
          MsgBox ("DELETE ROW : TO BE A FAILURE")
End If

End Sub

Private Sub Image1_Click()
        Sheets("MENU").Select
        Sheets("MENU").Cells(50, 1).Select
End Sub

Private Sub inserisci_Click()
      
      Dim j, k As Integer
If (numcolonna = 2 Or numcolonna = 9) And numriga > 14 Then
      If cek_ins_del Then
              For j = 94 To numriga + 1 Step -1
                     Cells(j, numcolonna + 1) = Cells(j - 1, numcolonna + 1)
                     Cells(j, numcolonna + 2) = Cells(j - 1, numcolonna + 2)
                     Cells(j, numcolonna + 3) = Cells(j - 1, numcolonna + 3)
                     Cells(j, numcolonna + 4) = Cells(j - 1, numcolonna + 4)
                     Cells(j, numcolonna + 5) = Cells(j - 1, numcolonna + 5)
                     Cells(j, numcolonna + 6) = Cells(j - 1, numcolonna + 6)
              Next j
              Cells(numriga, numcolonna + 1) = " "
              Cells(numriga, numcolonna + 2) = " "
              Cells(numriga, numcolonna + 3) = " "
              Cells(numriga, numcolonna + 4) = " "
              Cells(numriga, numcolonna + 5) = " "
              Cells(numriga, numcolonna + 6) = " "
      Else
          Beep
          MsgBox ("INSERT ROW : TO BE A FAILURE")
      End If
Else
          Beep
          MsgBox ("INSERT ROW : TO BE A FAILURE")
End If

End Sub

Private Sub Worksheet_Activate()
       nome_foglio = "ASSOLUTO"
End Sub

Private Sub Worksheet_SelectionChange(ByVal Target As Excel.Range)
       
       On Local Error GoTo err_range
       
       numriga = Target.Row
       numcolonna = Target.Column
       ntower = Sheets("F03").Cells(numriga, numcolonna)
       If IsNumeric(ntower) Then
                                numsost = Format(ntower, "###")
       Else
             numsost = ntower
       End If
       
If Sheets("HOME").flag_italiano.value Then
       If (numriga > 14 And numriga < 94) And (numcolonna = 2 Or numcolonna = 9) Then
             testo1 = Sheets("F03").Cells(209, 2)
             testo2 = Sheets("F03").Cells(210, 2)
             cek_ins_del = True
             If numcolonna = 2 Then
                                   riga_corrente.Caption = testo1 + " " + numsost + " : " + testo2
                                   riga_corrente_d.Caption = ""
             Else
                  riga_corrente_d.Caption = testo1 + " " + numsost + " : " + testo2
                  riga_corrente.Caption = ""
             End If
       Else
             testo1 = Sheets("F03").Cells(209, 2)
             testo2 = Sheets("F03").Cells(211, 2)
             riga_corrente.Caption = testo1 + " " + numsost + " : " + testo2
             riga_corrente_d.Caption = testo1 + " " + numsost + " : " + testo2
             cek_ins_del = False
       End If
Else
       If (numriga > 14 And numriga < 94) And (numcolonna = 2 Or numcolonna = 9) Then
             testo1 = Sheets("F03").Cells(224, 2)
             testo2 = Sheets("F03").Cells(225, 2)
             cek_ins_del = True
             If numcolonna = 2 Then
                                   riga_corrente.Caption = testo1 + " " + numsost + " : " + testo2
                                   riga_corrente_d.Caption = ""
             Else
                  riga_corrente_d.Caption = testo1 + " " + numsost + " : " + testo2
                  riga_corrente.Caption = ""
             End If
       Else
             testo1 = Sheets("F03").Cells(224, 2)
             testo2 = Sheets("F03").Cells(226, 2)
             riga_corrente.Caption = testo1 + " " + numsost + " : " + testo2
             riga_corrente_d.Caption = testo1 + " " + numsost + " : " + testo2
             cek_ins_del = False
       End If
End If
              
   'controllo per calcolo quote terreno o quote funi
   '---------------------------------------------------------
       If numcolonna = 5 Then GoSub calcola_terreno_salita
       If numcolonna = 4 Then
                            numcolonna = 5
                            numriga = numriga - 1
                            If numriga < 15 Then numriga = 15
                            GoSub calcola_terreno_salita
       End If
       If numcolonna = 12 Then GoSub calcola_terreno_discesa
       If numcolonna = 11 Then
                            numcolonna = 12
                            numriga = numriga - 1
                            If numriga < 15 Then numriga = 15
                            GoSub calcola_terreno_discesa
       End If
       If numcolonna = 7 Then GoSub calcola_qfune
       If numcolonna = 6 Then
                            numcolonna = 7
                            numriga = numriga - 1
                            If numriga < 15 Then numriga = 15
                            GoSub calcola_qfune
       End If
       If numcolonna = 14 Then GoSub calcola_qfune
       If numcolonna = 13 Then
                            numcolonna = 14
                            numriga = numriga - 1
                            If numriga < 15 Then numriga = 15
                            GoSub calcola_qfune
       End If
       If numcolonna = 8 Then GoSub calcola_hsostegno_salita
       If numcolonna = 7 Then
                            numcolonna = 8
                            numriga = numriga - 1
                            If numriga < 15 Then numriga = 15
                            GoSub calcola_hsostegno_salita
       End If
       If numcolonna = 15 Then GoSub calcola_hsostegno_discesa
       If numcolonna = 14 Then
                            numcolonna = 15
                            numriga = numriga - 1
                            If numriga < 15 Then numriga = 15
                            GoSub calcola_hsostegno_discesa
       End If
       Exit Sub
       
calcola_terreno_salita:
      'calcolo delle quote terreno ed altezze verticali sostegni
      'salita
      Call leggi_terreno
      w = 1
      p_fune = Sheets("F03").Cells(numriga, numcolonna - 1)
      If p_fune > prog_terr(1, nbs) Then
                                      Beep
                                      MsgBox ("Attenzione : errore progressiva terreno")
                                      Exit Sub
      End If
      If p_fune = 0 Then
                        'correzione per prima battuta =0
                        p_fune = 0.001
                        Sheets("F03").Cells(numriga, numcolonna - 1) = p_fune
      End If
      'verifica untima progressiva terreno > progressiva fune
      If p_fune >= prog_terr(1, nbs) Then
                                        'aggiunta battura terreno
                                        Sheets("F02").Cells(15 + nbs, 4) = p_fune + 5
                                        Sheets("F02").Cells(15 + nbs, 5) = Sheets("F02").Cells(15 + nbs - 1, 5)
                                        Call leggi_terreno
      End If
      While prog_terr(1, w) < p_fune
                                w = w + 1
      Wend
      If prog_terr(1, w - 1) = p_fune Then
                                Sheets("F03").Cells(numriga, numcolonna) = quot_terr(1, w - 1)
      Else
          p_delta = prog_terr(1, w) - prog_terr(1, w - 1)
          q_delta = quot_terr(1, w) - quot_terr(1, w - 1)
          q_terrpalo = quot_terr(1, w - 1) + (p_fune - prog_terr(1, w - 1)) * q_delta / p_delta
          Sheets("F03").Cells(numriga, numcolonna) = q_terrpalo
      End If
      Return
      
calcola_terreno_discesa:
      'discesa
      Call leggi_terreno
      w = 1
      p_fune = Sheets("F03").Cells(numriga, numcolonna - 1)
      If p_fune = 0 Then Beep: Exit Sub
      While prog_terr(2, w) < p_fune
                                w = w + 1
      Wend
      If prog_terr(2, w - 1) = p_fune Then
                                Sheets("F03").Cells(numriga, numcolonna) = quot_terr(2, w - 1)
      Else
          p_delta = prog_terr(2, w) - prog_terr(2, w - 1)
          q_delta = quot_terr(2, w) - quot_terr(2, w - 1)
          q_terrpalo = quot_terr(2, w - 1) + (p_fune - prog_terr(2, w - 1)) * q_delta / p_delta
          Sheets("F03").Cells(numriga_numcolonna) = q_terrpalo
      End If
      Return
       
calcola_qfune:
      h_fusto = Sheets("F03").Cells(numriga, numcolonna - 1)
      q_terrpalo = Sheets("F03").Cells(numriga, numcolonna - 2)
      If h_fusto > 0 And q_terrpalo > 0 Then
                    Sheets("F03").Cells(numriga, numcolonna) = q_terrpalo + h_fusto
      End If
      Return
      
calcola_hsostegno_salita:
       q_fune = Sheets("F03").Cells(numriga, numcolonna - 1)
       q_terrpalo = Sheets("F03").Cells(numriga, numcolonna - 3)
       h_fusto = q_fune - q_terrpalo
       If Sheets("F03").Cells(numriga, 4) > 0 Then
                                Sheets("F03").Cells(numriga, numcolonna - 2) = h_fusto
       End If
       Return
       
calcola_hsostegno_discesa:
       q_fune = Sheets("F03").Cells(numriga, numcolonna - 1)
       q_terrpalo = Sheets("F03").Cells(numriga, numcolonna - 3)
       h_fusto = q_fune - q_terrpalo
       If Sheets("F03").Cells(numriga, 11) > 0 Then
                                Sheets("F03").Cells(numriga, numcolonna - 2) = h_fusto
       End If
       Return
       
      
       
err_range:
          Beep
          MsgBox ("INVALID SELECTION")
          Exit Sub
End Sub
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VBA MACRO Linea1.cls 
in file: MONOFUNI.xls - OLE stream: '_VBA_PROJECT_CUR/VBA/Linea1'
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - 




Private Sub elimina_Click()

      Dim j, k As Integer
  If (numcolonna = 2 Or numcolonna = 6) And numriga > 14 Then
      If cek_ins_del Then
              For j = numriga To 93
                     Cells(j, numcolonna + 1) = Cells(j + 1, numcolonna + 1)
                     Cells(j, numcolonna + 2) = Cells(j + 1, numcolonna + 2)
                     Cells(j, numcolonna + 3) = Cells(j + 1, numcolonna + 3)
              Next j
      Else
          Beep
          If Sheets("HOME").flag_italiano Then
                                              testo = Sheets("F04").Cells(200, 11)
          Else
                testo = Sheets("F04").Cells(215, 11)
          End If
          MsgBox (testo)
      End If
  Else
          Beep
          If Sheets("HOME").flag_italiano Then
                                              testo = Sheets("F04").Cells(200, 11)
          Else
                testo = Sheets("F04").Cells(215, 11)
          End If
          MsgBox (testo)
  End If
End Sub

Private Sub Image1_Click()
    Sheets("MENU").Select
    Sheets("MENU").Cells(50, 1).Select
End Sub

Private Sub inserisci_Click()
      
      Dim j, k As Integer
If (numcolonna = 2 Or numcolonna = 6) And numriga > 14 Then
      If cek_ins_del Then
              For j = 94 To numriga + 1 Step -1
                     Cells(j, numcolonna + 1) = Cells(j - 1, numcolonna + 1)
                     Cells(j, numcolonna + 2) = Cells(j - 1, numcolonna + 2)
                     Cells(j, numcolonna + 3) = Cells(j - 1, numcolonna + 3)
              Next j
              Cells(numriga, numcolonna + 1) = " "
              Cells(numriga, numcolonna + 2) = " "
              Cells(numriga, numcolonna + 3) = " "
      Else
          Beep
          If Sheets("HOME").flag_italiano Then
                                              testo = Sheets("F04").Cells(200, 11)
          Else
                testo = Sheets("F04").Cells(215, 11)
          End If
          MsgBox (testo)
      End If
Else
          Beep
          If Sheets("HOME").flag_italiano Then
                                              testo = Sheets("F04").Cells(200, 11)
          Else
                testo = Sheets("F04").Cells(215, 11)
          End If
          MsgBox (testo)
End If

End Sub

Private Sub calc_assoluti_Click()

       Dim j, k, w, p As Integer
       Dim ncamp As String
       
       'pulizia dei campi valori del foglio F03
       nomefoglio = "F04"
       Call elimina_F03(nomefoglio)
       
       'controlla profilo terreno ramo salita
       Call leggi_terreno
       
       'ramo salita
       k = 1
       nc(k) = 0
       If Sheets("F04").Cells(15, 4) = 0 Then
                           Beep
                           If Sheets("HOME").flag_italiano Then
                                              testo = Sheets("F04").Cells(201, 11)
                           Else
                               testo = Sheets("F04").Cells(216, 11)
                           End If
                           MsgBox (testo)
                           Exit Sub
       Else
             progsost(k, 1) = Sheets("F04").Cells(6, 5)
             quotasost(k, 1) = Sheets("F04").Cells(7, 5)
             If quotasost(k, 1) + progsost(k, 1) = 0 Then
                           Beep
                           If Sheets("HOME").flag_italiano Then
                                              testo = Sheets("F04").Cells(202, 11)
                           Else
                               testo = Sheets("F04").Cells(217, 11)
                           End If
                           MsgBox (testo)
                           Exit Sub
             End If
             Sheets("F03").Cells(15, 4) = progsost(k, 1)
             Sheets("F03").Cells(15, 7) = quotasost(k, 1)
       End If
       
       w = 15
       j = 1
       While Sheets("F04").Cells(w, 4) <> 0
             nomecamp(k, j) = Sheets("F04").Cells(w, 3)
             Lorizz(k, j) = Sheets("F04").Cells(w, 4)
             Disliv(k, j) = Sheets("F04").Cells(w, 5)
             Corda(k, j) = Sqr(Lorizz(k, j) ^ 2 + Disliv(k, j) ^ 2)
             nc(k) = nc(k) + 1
             progsost(k, j + 1) = progsost(k, j) + Lorizz(k, j)
             quotasost(k, j + 1) = quotasost(k, j) + Disliv(k, j)
             Sheets("F03").Cells(w + 1, 4) = progsost(k, j + 1)
             Sheets("F03").Cells(w + 1, 7) = quotasost(k, j + 1)
             p = InStr(nomecamp(k, j), "-")
             If p <> 0 Then
                         Sheets("F03").Cells(w, 3) = mid(nomecamp(k, j), 1, p - 1)
                         Sheets("F03").Cells(w + 1, 3) = mid(nomecamp(k, j), p + 1, Len(nomecamp(k, j)))
             End If
             w = w + 1
             j = j + 1
      Wend
      For j = w + 1 To 94
             Sheets("F03").Cells(j, 3) = ""
             Sheets("F03").Cells(j, 4) = ""
             Sheets("F03").Cells(j, 5) = ""
             Sheets("F03").Cells(j, 6) = ""
             Sheets("F03").Cells(j, 7) = ""
             Sheets("F03").Cells(j, 8) = ""
      Next j
      
       'completa la tabella delle quote terreno ed altezze sostegni
       
       'ramo salita
       k = 1
       nc(k) = 0
       If Sheets("F03").Cells(15, 4) = 0 And Sheets("F03").Cells(15, 7) = 0 Then
                           Beep
                           MsgBox ("Mancanza Dati : verificare!")
                           Exit Sub
       Else
             nomesost(k, 1) = Sheets("F03").Cells(15, 3)
             progsost(k, 1) = Sheets("F03").Cells(15, 4)
             quotasost(k, 1) = Sheets("F03").Cells(15, 7)
       End If
       w = 15
       j = 1
       While Val(Sheets("F03").Cells(w + 1, 4)) <> 0 And Val(Sheets("F03").Cells(w + 1, 7)) <> 0
             w = w + 1
             j = j + 1
             nomesost(k, j) = Sheets("F03").Cells(w, 3)
             progsost(k, j) = Sheets("F03").Cells(w, 4)
             quotasost(k, j) = Sheets("F03").Cells(w, 7)
             nomecamp(k, j - 1) = nomesost(k, j - 1) + "-" + nomesost(k, j)
             Lorizz(k, j - 1) = progsost(k, j) - progsost(k, j - 1)
             Disliv(k, j - 1) = quotasost(k, j) - quotasost(k, j - 1)
             Corda(k, j - 1) = Sqr(Lorizz(k, j - 1) ^ 2 + Disliv(k, j - 1) ^ 2)
             nc(k) = nc(k) + 1
      Wend
      
       'ramo discesa
       k = 2
       nc(k) = 0
       If Sheets("F03").Cells(15, 11) = 0 And Sheets("F03").Cells(15, 14) = 0 Then
                           'ramo discesa = ramo salita salita
                           nc(2) = nc(1)
                           For j = 1 To nc(2)
                                 nomesost(2, j) = nomesost(1, j)
                                 progsost(2, j) = progsost(1, j)
                                 quotasost(2, j) = quotasost(1, j)
                                 If j > 1 Then
                                      nomecamp(2, j - 1) = nomecamp(1, j - 1)
                                      Lorizz(2, j - 1) = Lorizz(1, j - 1)
                                      Disliv(2, j - 1) = Disliv(1, j - 1)
                                      Corda(2, j - 1) = Corda(1, j - 1)
                                 End If
                           Next j
       Else
             nomesost(k, 1) = Sheets("F03").Cells(15, 10)
             progsost(k, 1) = Sheets("F03").Cells(15, 11)
             quotasost(k, 1) = Sheets("F03").Cells(15, 14)
       End If
       w = 15
       j = 1
       While Val(Sheets("F03").Cells(w + 1, 11)) <> 0 And Val(Sheets("F03").Cells(w + 1, 14)) <> 0
             w = w + 1
             j = j + 1
             nomesost(k, j) = Sheets("F03").Cells(w, 10)
             progsost(k, j) = Sheets("F03").Cells(w, 11)
             quotasost(k, j) = Sheets("F03").Cells(w, 14)
             nomecamp(k, j - 1) = nomesost(k, j - 1) + "-" + nomesost(k, j)
             Lorizz(k, j - 1) = progsost(k, j) - progsost(k, j - 1)
             Disliv(k, j - 1) = quotasost(k, j) - quotasost(k, j - 1)
             Corda(k, j - 1) = Sqr(Lorizz(k, j - 1) ^ 2 + Disliv(k, j - 1) ^ 2)
             nc(k) = nc(k) + 1
      Wend
      
      'calcolo delle quote terreno ed altezze verticali sostegni
      'salita
      If nbs > 0 Then
         For j = 1 To nc(1) + 1
                   w = 1
                   While prog_terr(1, w) < progsost(1, j)
                                                     w = w + 1
                   Wend
                   If prog_terr(1, w - 1) = progsost(1, j) Then
                                         Sheets("F03").Cells(14 + j, 5) = quot_terr(1, w - 1)
                                         Sheets("F03").Cells(14 + j, 6) = quotasost(1, j) - quot_terr(1, w - 1)
                   Else
                        p_delta = prog_terr(1, w) - prog_terr(1, w - 1)
                        q_delta = quot_terr(1, w) - quot_terr(1, w - 1)
                        q_terrpalo = quot_terr(1, w - 1) + (progsost(1, j) - prog_terr(1, w - 1)) * q_delta / p_delta
                        Sheets("F03").Cells(14 + j, 5) = q_terrpalo
                        Sheets("F03").Cells(14 + j, 6) = quotasost(1, j) - q_terrpalo
                   End If
         Next j
      End If
      'discesa
      If nbd > 0 Then
        If nc(1) <> nc(2) Then
           For j = 1 To nc(2) + 1
                   w = 1
                   While prog_terr(2, w) < progsost(2, j)
                                                    w = w + 1
                   Wend
                   If prog_terr(2, w - 1) = progsost(2, j) Then
                                         Sheets("F03").Cells(14 + j, 12) = quot_terr(2, w - 1)
                                         Sheets("F03").Cells(14 + j, 13) = quotasost(1, j) - quot_terr(2, w - 1)
                   Else
                        p_delta = prog_terr(2, w) - prog_terr(2, w - 1)
                        q_delta = quot_terr(2, w) - quot_terr(2, w - 1)
                        q_terrpalo = quot_terr(2, w - 1) + (progsost(2, j) - prog_terr(2, w - 1)) * q_delta / p_delta
                        Sheets("F03").Cells(14 + j, 12) = q_terrpalo
                        Sheets("F03").Cells(14 + j, 13) = quotasost(2, j) - q_terrpalo
                   End If
           Next j
        End If
      End If
      
      Sheets("F03").Select
      Sheets("F03").Range("C15").Select

End Sub


Private Sub Worksheet_Activate()
        nome_foglio = "RELATIVO"
End Sub

Private Sub Worksheet_SelectionChange(ByVal Target As Excel.Range)
       
       On Local Error GoTo err_range_F04
       
       ntower = "": numsost = ""
       numriga = Target.Row
       numcolonna = Target.Column
       ntower = Sheets("F04").Cells(numriga, numcolonna)
       If IsNumeric(ntower) Then
                                numsost = Format(ntower, "###")
       Else
             numsost = ntower
       End If
       
   If Sheets("HOME").flag_italiano.value Then
             If numcolonna < 6 Then
                                   rramo$ = Sheets("F04").Cells(203, 11)
             Else
                   rramo$ = Sheets("F04").Cells(204, 11)
             End If
             If (numriga > 14 And numriga < 94) And (numcolonna = 2 Or numcolonna = 6) Then
                     testo = Sheets("F04").Cells(208, 11) + " = " + numsost + "  " + rramo$ + " : " + Sheets("F04").Cells(205, 11)
                     riga_relativa.Caption = testo
                     cek_ins_del = True
             Else
                     testo = Sheets("F04").Cells(208, 11) + "  " + rramo$ + " : " + Sheets("F04").Cells(206, 11)
                     riga_relativa.Caption = testo
                     cek_ins_del = False
             End If
   Else
             If numcolonna < 6 Then
                                   rramo$ = Sheets("F04").Cells(218, 11)
             Else
                  rramo$ = Sheets("F04").Cells(219, 11)
             End If
             If (numriga > 14 And numriga < 94) And (numcolonna = 2 Or numcolonna = 6) Then
                     testo = Sheets("F04").Cells(223, 11) + " = " + numsost + "  " + rramo$ + " : " + Sheets("F04").Cells(220, 11)
                     riga_relativa.Caption = testo
                     cek_ins_del = True
             Else
                     testo = Sheets("F04").Cells(223, 11) + "  " + rramo$ + " : " + Sheets("F04").Cells(221, 11)
                     riga_relativa.Caption = testo
                     cek_ins_del = False
             End If
  End If
  
       Exit Sub
       
err_range_F04:
          Beep
          If Sheets("HOME").flag_italiano.value Then
                testo = Sheets("F04").Cells(207, 11)
                MsgBox (testo)
          Else
                testo = Sheets("F04").Cells(222, 11)
                MsgBox (testo)
          End If
          
          Exit Sub
End Sub
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VBA MACRO ThisWorkbook.cls 
in file: MONOFUNI.xls - OLE stream: '_VBA_PROJECT_CUR/VBA/ThisWorkbook'
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - 
Private Sub Workbook_Open()

On Local Error GoTo err_open_menu

Dim ok As Integer
Dim codice As String

    'controllo e creazione esistenza dir file transito
    ok = 1
    MkDir "C:\TMP_SIF"
    
    'lettura o creazione file per codice attivazione
    ok = 2
    Open "C:\TMP_SIF\MONOFUNI_PSWKEY" For Input As #1
    ok = 3
    Input #1, codice
    Close
    
    Open "C:\TMP_SIF\MONOFUNI_TEST_PSWKEY" For Output As #1
    Print #1, "****"
    Close
    
    Call DiskInfo
    
riprova:
    'password x MONOFUNI
    'calcolo codici di attivazione
    i1% = InStr(cek_codice_numserie, "-")
    If i1% > 0 Then
                   cd1$ = mid$(cek_codice_numserie, 1, i1% - 1)
                   cd2$ = mid$(cek_codice_numserie, i1% + 1, Len(cek_codice_numserie))
    Else
        cd1$ = cek_codice_numserie
        cd2$ = "SIF"
    End If
    c1 = 0
    For jjj% = 1 To Len(cd1$)
                           cc1 = Asc(mid$(cd1$, jjj%, 1))
                           cc1 = cc1 * jjj% * (7 + jjj%) - Asc(mid$(cd1$, jjj%, 1))
                           c1 = c1 + cc1
    Next jjj%
    c2 = 0
    For jjj% = 1 To Len(cd2$)
                          cc2 = Asc(mid$(cd2$, jjj%, 1))
                          cc2 = cc2 * jjj% * (98 + jjj% * 11) + Asc(mid$(cd2$, jjj%, 1))
                          c2 = c2 + cc2
    Next jjj%
    c3 = Int((Sqr(c1 ^ 1.8 + c2 ^ 1.9) / 2.222 * Sqr(2.88)) * 10)
    mask$ = "##########"
    cek$ = Format$(c1, mask$) + "." + Format$(c2, mask$) + "." + Format$(c3, mask$)
    ok = 0
    If cek$ = codice Then
                          Open "C:\TMP_SIF\MONOFUNI_TEST_PSWKEY" For Output As #1
                          Print #1, "activate"
                          Close
    End If
    
    If cek$ <> codice Then
                         Beep
                         nr = Chr(13) + Chr(10)
                         If Sheets("HOME").flag_italiano.value Then
                           avviso = "CODICE DI ATTIVAZIONE NON VALIDO : "
                           avviso = avviso + nr + nr
                           avviso = avviso + "CODICE MACCHINA : " + cek_codice_numserie
                           avviso = avviso + nr + nr
                           avviso = avviso + "Comunicare al distributore del programma il codice macchina per ottenere il codice di attivazione!" + nr
                         Else
                           avviso = "NON VALID CODE OF ACTIVATION : "
                           avviso = avviso + nr + nr
                           avviso = avviso + "CODE PLOTS : " + cek_codice_numserie
                           avviso = avviso + nr + nr
                           avviso = avviso + "To communicate the code to the distributor of the program plots for getting the code of activation!" + nr
                         End If
                         result = MsgBox(avviso, 48, "<<<<  INVALID  PASSWORD >>>>")
                         ok = 9
    End If
    If ok <> 0 Then
                   Beep
                   If Sheets("HOME").flag_italiano.value Then
                            testomes = "INSERIRE IL CODICE DI ATTIVAZIONE"
                   Else
                            testomes = "TO INSERT THE CODE OF ACTIVATION"
                   End If
                   codice = InputBox(testomes, , "NNNN.NNNNN.NNNNNN")
                   If codice = "" Then
                                     Windows(1).Close
                   Else
                            Open "C:\TMP_SIF\MONOFUNI_PSWKEY" For Output As #1
                            Print #1, codice
                            Close
                            GoTo riprova
                   End If
    End If
    Close
    
    Sheets("HOME").Activate
    Sheets("HOME").Cells(50, 1).Activate
    
    'leggi path_programmi (mia_path)
    Open "c:\tmp_sif\prg_path" For Input As #1
    Input #1, mia_path
    Close
    
    test_ricalcolo = True
    
Exit Sub

err_open_menu:
              If ok = 7 Then
                            Beep
                            MsgBox ("DEFAULT LANGUAGE = IT")
                            Close
                            Exit Sub
              End If
              If ok = 1 Then Resume Next
              If ok = 2 Then
                            Open "C:\TMP_SIF\KEY_SIF" For Output As #1
                            Print #1, "NNNN.NNNNN.NNNNNN"
                            Close
                            Open "C:\TMP_SIF\KEY_SIF" For Input As #1
                            Resume Next
              End If
              
              
           
End Sub
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
VBA MACRO Modulo1.bas 
in file: MONOFUNI.xls - OLE stream: '_VBA_PROJECT_CUR/VBA/Modulo1'
- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - 



Public mia_path As String
Public tipo_impianto, tstringa, fgl, lingua As String
Public test_ricalcolo As Boolean

Public Const PI# = 3.141
Public Const G# = 0.981
Public Const KTERMICO# = 0.000012

'variabili comuni al calcolo di linea (Calcolo.BI)
Public scelta%, kk%, xx%, ipoipo, descrizione$, spool$, Aze$, Nazione$
Public ramo%, nomeramo$, mask$, vval$, fPress
Public workarea$, versione$
Public XIndex As Integer

Public Sub salti_pagina(fgl)

On Local Error GoTo err_salta

For Each interrpag In Worksheets(fgl).HPageBreaks
    If interrpag.Extent = xlPageBreakFull Then
        cIntere = cIntere + 1
    Else
        cParziali = cParziali + 1
    End If
Next
'MsgBox cIntere & " interruzioni di pagina di schermo intero, " & cParziali & _
    " interruzioni di pagina di area di stampa"
For j% = 1 To cIntere
        Worksheets(fgl).HPageBreaks(j%).Delete
Next j%
For j% = 1 To cParziali
        Worksheets(fgl).HPageBreaks(j%).Delete
Next j%

Exit Sub

err_salta:
         Beep
End Sub

Public Sub leggi_terreno()
       'controlla profilo terreno ramo salita
       nbs = 1
       w = 15
       j = 4
       k = 5
       prog_terr(1, nbs) = Sheets("F02").Cells(w, j)
       quot_terr(1, nbs) = Sheets("F02").Cells(w, k)
       While prog_terr(1, nbs) + quot_terr(1, nbs) <> 0
                  nbs = nbs + 1
                  w = w + 1
                  prog_terr(1, nbs) = Sheets("F02").Cells(w, j)
                  quot_terr(1, nbs) = Sheets("F02").Cells(w, k)
       Wend
       nbs = nbs - 1
       If nbs < 2 Then
                      nbd = 0
                      Beep
                      MsgBox ("Mancanza profilo terreno")
                      Exit Sub
       End If
       'controlla profilo terreno ramo discesa
       nbd = 1
       w = 15
       j = 9
       k = 10
       prog_terr(2, nbd) = Sheets("F02").Cells(w, j)
       quot_terr(2, nbd) = Sheets("F02").Cells(w, k)
       While prog_terr(2, nbd) + quot_terr(2, nbd) <> 0
                  nbd = nbd + 1
                  w = w + 1
                  prog_terr(2, nbd) = Sheets("F02").Cells(w, j)
                  quot_terr(2, nbd) = Sheets("F02").Cells(w, k)
       Wend
       nbd = nbd - 1
End Sub


Public Sub leggi_linea()
                      
           'lettura ramo salita
           j% = 1
           riga% = 15
           quota(1, j%) = Sheets("F03").Cells(riga%, 7)
           prog(1, j%) = Sheets("F03").Cells(riga%, 4)
           n$(1, j%) = Sheets("F03").Cells(riga%, 3)
           hv(1, j%) = Sheets("F03").Cells(riga%, 6)
           rulli(1, j%) = CDbl(Sheets("F03").Cells(riga%, 8)): Sheets("F03").Cells(riga%, 8) = rulli(1, j%)
           rulli(2, j%) = CDbl(Sheets("F03").Cells(riga%, 15)): Sheets("F03").Cells(riga%, 15) = rulli(2, j%)
           r1(j%) = rulli(1, j%)
           camp$(1, j%) = " "
           riga% = riga% + 1
           While Val(Sheets("F03").Cells(riga%, 4)) <> 0 And Val(Sheets("F03").Cells(riga%, 7)) <> 0
                      j% = j% + 1
                      quota(1, j%) = Sheets("F03").Cells(riga%, 7)
                      prog(1, j%) = Sheets("F03").Cells(riga%, 4)
                      d(1, j% - 1) = quota(1, j%) - quota(1, j% - 1)
                      l(1, j% - 1) = prog(1, j%) - prog(1, j% - 1)
                      n$(1, j%) = Sheets("F03").Cells(riga%, 3)
                      hv(1, j%) = Sheets("F03").Cells(riga%, 6)
                      rulli(1, j%) = CDbl(Sheets("F03").Cells(riga%, 8)): Sheets("F03").Cells(riga%, 8) = rulli(1, j%)
                      r1(j%) = rulli(1, j%)
                      rulli(2, j%) = CDbl(Sheets("F03").Cells(riga%, 15)): Sheets("F03").Cells(riga%, 15) = rulli(2, j%)
                      camp$(1, j%) = n$(1, j% - 1) + " - " + n$(1, j%)
                      riga% = riga% + 1
           Wend
           ns = j%
           
           'lettura ramo discesa
           'controllo se celle ramo discesa sono riempite
           j% = 2: riga% = 15
           prog(2, j%) = Sheets("F03").Cells(16, 11)
           If Val(prog(2, j%)) = 0 Then
               'salita = discesa
               nd = ns
               For j% = 1 To nd
                      quota(2, j%) = quota(1, j%)
                      prog(2, j%) = prog(1, j%)
                      d(2, j%) = d(1, j%)
                      l(2, j%) = l(1, j%)
                      n$(2, j%) = n$(1, j%)
                      hv(2, j%) = hv(1, j%)
                      If rulli(2, j%) = 0 Then rulli(2, j%) = rulli(1, j%): Sheets("F03").Cells(riga%, 15) = rulli(2, j%)
                      r2(j%) = rulli(2, j%)
                      camp$(2, j%) = camp$(1, j%)
                      riga% = riga% + 1
               Next j%
           Else
               j% = 1
               riga% = 15
               quota(2, j%) = Sheets("F03").Cells(riga%, 14)
               prog(2, j%) = Sheets("F03").Cells(riga%, 11)
               d(2, j%) = 0
               l(2, j%) = 0
               n$(2, j%) = Sheets("F03").Cells(riga%, 10)
               hv(2, j%) = Sheets("F03").Cells(riga%, 13)
               rulli(2, j%) = CDbl(Sheets("F03").Cells(riga%, 15)): Sheets("F03").Cells(riga%, 15) = rulli(2, j%)
               r2(j%) = rulli(2, j%)
               camp$(2, j%) = " "
               riga% = riga% + 1
               While CDbl(Sheets("F03").Cells(riga%, 4)) <> 0 And CDbl(Sheets("F03").Cells(riga%, 7)) <> 0
                      j% = j% + 1
                      quota(2, j%) = Sheets("F03").Cells(riga%, 14)
                      prog(2, j%) = Sheets("F03").Cells(riga%, 11)
                      d(2, j% - 1) = quota(2, j%) - quota(2, j% - 1)
                      l(2, j% - 1) = prog(2, j%) - prog(2, j% - 1)
                      n$(2, j%) = Sheets("F03").Cells(riga%, 10)
                      hv(2, j%) = Sheets("F03").Cells(riga%, 13)
                      rulli(2, j%) = CDbl(Sheets("F03").Cells(riga%, 15)): Sheets("F03").Cells(riga%, 15) = rulli(2, j%)
                      r2(j%) = rulli(2, j%)
                      camp$(2, j%) = n$(2, j% - 1) + " - " + n$(2, j%)
                      riga% = riga% + 1
               Wend
               nd = j%
           End If
           
           'generazione tabella attriti di default
           riga% = 12
           For j% = 2 To ns - 1
                   If Val(Sheets("F07").Cells(riga%, 4)) = 0 Then
                                       Sheets("F07").Cells(riga%, 2) = n$(1, j%)
                                       Sheets("F07").Cells(riga%, 3) = "%"
                                       Sheets("F07").Cells(riga%, 4) = Sheets("F07").Cells(4, 9)
                                       Sheets("F07").Cells(riga%, 5) = Sheets("F07").Cells(5, 9)
                   End If
                   riga% = riga% + 1
           Next j%
           riga% = 12
           For j% = 2 To nd - 1
                   If Val(Sheets("F07").Cells(riga%, 9)) = 0 Then
                                       Sheets("F07").Cells(riga%, 7) = n$(2, j%)
                                       Sheets("F07").Cells(riga%, 8) = "%"
                                       Sheets("F07").Cells(riga%, 9) = Sheets("F07").Cells(4, 9)
                                       Sheets("F07").Cells(riga%, 10) = Sheets("F07").Cells(5, 9)
                   End If
                   riga% = riga% + 1
           Next j%
          
End Sub


Public Sub assegna_generali()
                
        Dim err_help As String
        Dim nrig, ncol, num_err As Integer
        
        'assegna da opzioni
        If Sheets("F01").ancorato_fisso.value Then tipotiro$ = "A"
        If Sheets("F01").argano_mon.value Then m$ = "MONTE"
        If Sheets("F01").argano_val.value Then m$ = "VALLE"
        If Sheets("F01").F.value Then ZETA = "F"
        If Sheets("F01").i.value Then ZETA = "I"
        If Sheets("F01").in_tensione.value Then tipotiro$ = "T"
        If Sheets("F01").rotaz_antior.value Then sensomarcia$ = Sheets("F01").rotaz_antior.Caption
        If Sheets("F01").rotaz_or.value Then sensomarcia$ = Sheets("F01").rotaz_or.Caption
        If Sheets("F01").s.value Then ZETA = "S"
        If Sheets("F01").T.value Then ZETA = "T"
        If Sheets("F01").tensione_mon.value Then tt$ = "MONTE"
        If Sheets("F01").tensione_val.value Then tt$ = "VALLE"
        If Sheets("F01").tipo_tend_grav.value Then tipotensione$ = "G"
        If Sheets("F01").tipo_tend_idra.value Then tipotensione$ = "I"
        tipocontr$ = tipotensione$
        If Sheets("F01").car_salita.value Then flagdiscesa = 0
        If Sheets("F01").car_salita_discesa.value Then flagdiscesa = 1
        If Sheets("F01").test_vento_fe_si.value Then flagvento = 1
        If Sheets("F01").test_vento_fe_no.value Then flagvento = 0
        
        attr0 = Sheets("F01").Cells(53, 5): If attr0 = 0 Then num_err = 2: GoSub test_err
        attr1 = Sheets("F01").Cells(54, 5): If attr0 = 0 Then num_err = 3: GoSub test_err
        If Sheets("F07").Cells(4, 9) = 0 Then Sheets("F07").Cells(4, 9) = attr0
        If Sheets("F07").Cells(5, 9) = 0 Then Sheets("F07").Cells(5, 9) = attr1
        
        nome$ = Sheets("F01").Cells(3, 4)
        impianto$ = Sheets("F01").Cells(4, 4)
        port = Sheets("F01").Cells(41, 5): If port = 0 Then num_err = 1: GoSub test_err
        vel = Sheets("F01").Cells(42, 5): If vel = 0 Then num_err = 4: GoSub test_err
        posti = Sheets("F01").Cells(43, 5): If posti = 0 Then num_err = 5: GoSub test_err
        persona = Sheets("F01").Cells(44, 5): If persona = 0 Then num_err = 6: GoSub test_err
        tipof$ = Sheets("F01").Cells(7, 4)
        dia = Sheets("F01").Cells(8, 5)
        qv = Sheets("F01").Cells(45, 5)
        qc = Sheets("F01").Cells(46, 5)
        contr = Sheets("F01").Cells(40, 5)
        ng = Sheets("F01").Cells(32, 10)
        vg = Sheets("F01").Cells(33, 10)
        eg = Sheets("F01").Cells(34, 10)
        descagg$ = Sheets("F01").Cells(5, 4)
        lungpass = 0
        
        scart = Sheets("F01").Cells(59, 5)
        buco = Sheets("F01").Cells(39, 5)
        morse = Sheets("F01").Cells(61, 5)
        areac = Sheets("F01").Cells(65, 5)
        areav = Sheets("F01").Cells(64, 5)
        acc = Sheets("F01").Cells(47, 5)
        dec = Sheets("F01").Cells(48, 5)
        fren = Sheets("F01").Cells(49, 5)
        rap = Sheets("F01").Cells(50, 5)
        frinv = 0
        vento2 = Sheets("F01").Cells(66, 5)
        vento1 = Sheets("F01").Cells(67, 5)
        argano = Sheets("F01").Cells(51, 5)
        rendarg = Sheets("F01").Cells(52, 5)
        modulo = Sheets("F01").Cells(13, 5)
        
        area = Sheets("F01").Cells(9, 5)
        mf = Sheets("F01").Cells(10, 5)
        fili = Sheets("F01").Cells(11, 5)
        res = Sheets("F01").Cells(12, 5)
        dias = Sheets("F01").Cells(24, 5)
        ds1 = Sheets("F01").Cells(27, 5)
        ms = Sheets("F01").Cells(26, 5)
        ms1 = 0  ' calcolare
        srott = Sheets("F01").Cells(28, 5)
        areas = Sheets("F01").Cells(25, 5)
        
        rullier$ = Sheets("F01").Cells(68, 5)
        mapp = Sheets("F01").Cells(69, 5)
        mrit = Sheets("F01").Cells(70, 5)
        dapp = Sheets("F01").Cells(71, 5)
        drit = Sheets("F01").Cells(72, 5)
        diaapp = dapp
        diarit = drit
        cmaxapp = Sheets("F01").Cells(75, 5)
        cmaxrit = Sheets("F01").Cells(76, 5)
        devmaxapp = Sheets("F01").Cells(73, 5)
        devmaxrit = Sheets("F01").Cells(74, 5)
        pstazione = Sheets("F01").Cells(55, 5)
        Ftrave = Sheets("F01").Cells(56, 5)
        DEtiporul$ = Sheets("F01").Cells(77, 5)
        DEdiamrul = Sheets("F01").Cells(78, 5)
        DEmassarul = Sheets("F01").Cells(79, 5)
        DEcarmax = Sheets("F01").Cells(80, 5)
        tipoveic$ = Sheets("F01").Cells(60, 5)
        Intstaz = Sheets("F01").Cells(57, 5)
        Drt = Sheets("F01").Cells(57, 5)
        Drtrin = Sheets("F01").Cells(58, 5)
        
        dd = 3600 / port * posti * vel
        
        ttel = tsegn
        Qf = mf * G#
        If ZETA = "I" Then
                        Nvg = vg
                        Ev = eg
        Else
            Nvg = 1
            Ev = dd
        End If
        
        Exit Sub
        
test_err:
            Beep
            Sheets("F01").Select
            Select Case num_err
                   Case 1
                        err_help = "portata = 0"
                        nrig = 41: ncol = 5
                   Case 2
                        err_help = "Attrito e regime = 0"
                        nrig = 53: ncol = 5
                   Case 3
                        err_help = "attrito in frenatura = 0"
                        nrig = 54: ncol = 5
                   Case 4
                        err_help = "velocità di esercizio = 0"
                        nrig = 42: ncol = 5
                   Case 5
                        err_help = "numero posti veicolo = 0"
                        nrig = 43: ncol = 5
                   Case 6
                        err_help = "peso persona = 0"
                        nrig = 44: ncol = 5
                        
                        
                        
            End Select
            MsgBox ("Warning : " & err_help)
            Sheets("F01").Cells(nrig, ncol).Select

End Sub

Public Sub virgola_to_punto(tstringa)

        Dim lstringa As Integer
        lstringa = Len(tstringa)
        If lstringa > 0 Then
           If mid(tstringa, lstringa, 1) = "," Then
                          Mid(tstringa, lstringa, 1) = "."
           End If
        End If

End Sub

Public Sub esegui_verifica(XIndex As Integer)

   
        Dim nsost, cval, cmon As String
        Dim tvv, tmm, ffcc, avv, amm, aa1, aa2 As Double
        Dim saltot As Integer
        Dim stato_prg As String
        
        Ins% = ns + 4 + 2   'massimo numero di sostegni per ramo salita
        nr% = 2              'massimo numero di rami impianto
        u% = 40             'massimo veicoli in campata
        T% = 400            'massimo numero di veicoli per ramo di impianto
        '----------------------------dim shared  ARRAY---------------------------------------
        ReDim Av(nr%, Ins%), Am(nr%, Ins%), Tcv(nr%, Ins%), Tcm(nr%, Ins%), Tp(nr%, Ins%)
        ReDim Tm0(nr%, Ins%), Sv0(nr%, Ins%)
        ReDim Dp(nr%, Ins%), Pp(nr%, Ins%), attrito(nr%, Ins%)
        ReDim Bo(nr%, Ins%, u%), Pr(nr%, T%), ncnc(nr%, Ins%), alfa(nr%, Ins%), PV(nr%, Ins%)
        ReDim i(nr%)
        ReDim maxps(nr%, Ins%), minps(nr%, Ins%)
        ReDim Fm(nr%, Ins%), s(nr%, Ins%)
        ReDim FV(u%), FF(u%), Allung(nr%, Ins%)
        ReDim Hc(nr%, Ins%), Fvc(u%), Fmmax(nr%, Ins%), Fmmin(nr%, Ins%), Fvt(u%)
        ReDim maxav(nr%, Ins%), maxam(nr%, Ins%), minav(nr%, Ins%), minam(nr%, Ins%), maxdev(nr%, Ins%)
        ReDim mindev(nr%, Ins%), maxtv(nr%, Ins%), maxtm(nr%, Ins%), mintv(nr%, Ins%), mintm(nr%, Ins%)
        ReDim maxattr(nr%, Ins%), minattr(nr%, Ins%), maxtp(nr%, Ins%), mintp(nr%, Ins%), maxsq(Ins%)

        path$ = "C:\TMP_SIF\"
        nome$ = "valori"
        'stato_prg = Sheets("F05").in_esecuzione.Caption
        Sheets("F05").Cells(26, 6) = ""
        Sheets("F05").in_esecuzione.Visible = True
        
        If Sheets("F05").Option1_maxmin.value Then
                                                    'vedi massimi e minimi
                                                    flagmed% = 0
        Else
             'vedi valori medi
             flagmed% = 9
        End If
        
        'leggi la matrice ipotesi di calcolo (SiNo%(15,6)
        For numr = 10 To 24
              For numc = 4 To 9
                   kk% = numr - 9
                   xx% = numc - 3
                   SiNo%(kk%, xx%) = 0
                   If Cells(numr, numc) = "OOO" Then
                                                    SiNo%(kk%, xx%) = 1
                   End If
                   If Cells(numr, numc) = "XXX" Then SiNo%(kk%, xx%) = 2
              Next numc
        Next numr
        
        If ZETA = "F" Then
                    eg = Sheets("F05").Cells(5, 15)
                    Ev = eg
        Else
            If ZETA <> "I" Then eg = dd: Ev = eg
        End If
                        
        'lettura passo di spostamento veicoli e spiazzamenti iniziale e finale
        'controllo valore del passo
        avanzamento = Sheets("F05").step_car.value
        spziniz = 0
        spzfin = 0
        
        If ZETA = "I" Then
                        passo = Ev
                        spzfin = eg
                        Sheets("F05").Cells(10, 15) = Format(passo, "###0.00")
        Else
              passo = eg / avanzamento: Sheets("F05").Cells(10, 15) = Format(passo, "###0.00")
              spzfin = eg
        End If
        
        
        'possibilità di calcolare una sola posizione dei veicoli
        '-------------------------------------------------------
        If passo = -1 Then
                          flagmed% = 9
                          passo = 1
                          spzfin = spziniz
        End If
        '-------------------------------------------------------
        
        lll% = Int((spzfin - spziniz) / passo) + 1
        If lll% > 800 Then
                        Beep
                        MsgBox ("Error : n°step > 800")
                        Exit Sub
        End If
        k% = 0
        precalc% = 0
'--------------------------< INIZIO DEL CICLO DI VERIFICA LINEA >------------
        If XIndex = 1 Then
                        'precalcolo tensione idraulica
                        precalc% = 1
                        GoSub precalcolo
                        precalc% = 0
                        XIndex = 1

                        For zzz% = 5 To 7
                            For uu% = 1 To 3
                                  corsaz(zzz%, uu%) = corsaz(zzz% - 4, uu%) - corsaz(zzz% - 3, uu%)
                            Next uu%
                        Next zzz%
                        Load idraulic_input
                        
                        idraulic_input.TextBox1.Text = 30: saltot = 30
                        corsaz(8, 1) = KTERMICO# * lanello / 2 * saltot
                        corsaz(9, 1) = 0.3
                        corsaz(10, 1) = 0.1
                        
                        If ZETA <> "F" Then
                                corsaz(11, 1) = corsaz(5, 1) + corsaz(6, 1) + corsaz(7, 1) + corsaz(8, 1) + corsaz(9, 1) + corsaz(10, 1)
                                corsaz(12, 1) = corsaz(5, 2) + corsaz(6, 2) + corsaz(7, 2) + corsaz(8, 1) + corsaz(9, 1) + corsaz(10, 1)
                                corsaz(13, 1) = corsaz(5, 3) + corsaz(6, 3) + corsaz(7, 3) + corsaz(8, 1) + corsaz(9, 1) + corsaz(10, 1)
                        Else
                                corsaz(11, 1) = corsaz(6, 1) + corsaz(7, 1) + corsaz(8, 1) + corsaz(9, 1) + corsaz(10, 1)
                                corsaz(12, 1) = corsaz(6, 2) + corsaz(7, 2) + corsaz(8, 1) + corsaz(9, 1) + corsaz(10, 1)
                                corsaz(13, 1) = corsaz(6, 3) + corsaz(7, 3) + corsaz(8, 1) + corsaz(9, 1) + corsaz(10, 1)
                        End If
                        maxcorsa = 0
                        If corsaz(11, 1) > maxcorsa Then maxcorsa = corsaz(11, 1)
                        If corsaz(12, 1) > maxcorsa Then maxcorsa = corsaz(12, 1)
                        If corsaz(13, 1) > maxcorsa Then maxcorsa = corsaz(13, 1)
                        corsaz(14, 1) = Int(corsaz(11, 1) * 10) / 10 + 0.1
                        
                        mask$ = "####0.00"
                        For zzz% = 1 To 7
                           For ii% = 1 To 3
                               uu% = (zzz% - 1) * 3 + ii%
                               tstringa = Format(corsaz(zzz%, ii%), mask$)
                               Call codifica(tstringa)
                               Select Case uu%
                                              Case 1
                                                     idraulic_input.Label13.Caption = tstringa
                                              Case 2
                                                     idraulic_input.Label14.Caption = tstringa
                                              Case 3
                                                     idraulic_input.Label15.Caption = tstringa
                                              Case 4
                                                     idraulic_input.Label16.Caption = tstringa
                                              Case 5
                                                     idraulic_input.Label17.Caption = tstringa
                                              Case 6
                                                     idraulic_input.Label18.Caption = tstringa
                                              Case 7
                                                     idraulic_input.Label19.Caption = tstringa
                                              Case 8
                                                     idraulic_input.Label20.Caption = tstringa
                                              Case 9
                                                     idraulic_input.Label21.Caption = tstringa
                                              Case 10
                                                     idraulic_input.Label22.Caption = tstringa
                                              Case 11
                                                     idraulic_input.Label23.Caption = tstringa
                                              Case 12
                                                     idraulic_input.Label24.Caption = tstringa
                                              Case 13
                                                     idraulic_input.Label25.Caption = tstringa
                                              Case 14
                                                     idraulic_input.Label26.Caption = tstringa
                                              Case 15
                                                     idraulic_input.Label27.Caption = tstringa
                                              Case 16
                                                     idraulic_input.Label28.Caption = tstringa
                                              Case 17
                                                     idraulic_input.Label29.Caption = tstringa
                                              Case 18
                                                     idraulic_input.Label30.Caption = tstringa
                                              Case 19
                                                     idraulic_input.Label31.Caption = tstringa
                                              Case 20
                                                     idraulic_input.Label32.Caption = tstringa
                                              Case 21
                                                     idraulic_input.Label33.Caption = tstringa
                               End Select
                           Next ii%
                        Next zzz%
                        tstringa = Format(corsaz(8, 1), mask$)
                        Call codifica(tstringa): idraulic_input.Label34.Caption = tstringa
                        tstringa = Format(corsaz(9, 1), mask$)
                        Call codifica(tstringa): idraulic_input.TextBox2.Text = tstringa
                        tstringa = Format(corsaz(10, 1), mask$)
                        Call codifica(tstringa): idraulic_input.TextBox3.Text = tstringa
                        tstringa = Format(corsaz(14, 1), mask$)
                        Call codifica(tstringa): idraulic_input.TextBox4.Text = tstringa
                        tstringa = Format(corsaz(11, 1), mask$)
                        Call codifica(tstringa): idraulic_input.Label35.Caption = tstringa
                        tstringa = Format(corsaz(12, 1), mask$)
                        Call codifica(tstringa): idraulic_input.Label36.Caption = tstringa
                        tstringa = Format(corsaz(13, 1), mask$)
                        Call codifica(tstringa): idraulic_input.Label37.Caption = tstringa

                        'picture1.Visible = 0
                        'If ZETA = "F" Then option2(1).Value = -1
                        Sheets("F05").Cells(26, 6) = ""
                        Sheets("F05").in_esecuzione.Visible = False
                        Exit Sub
        End If

        If XIndex = 2 Then
                        corsacil = Val(idraulic_input.TextBox4)
                        If idraulic_input.Opt1.value Then
                                         corsazero = Val(idraulic_input.Label13.Caption)
                        Else
                            corsazero = Val(idraulic_input.Label16.Caption)
                        End If
                        XIndex = 1
                        precalc% = 0
        End If

        If XIndex = 3 Then Close: Exit Sub

        If XIndex = 4 Then
                         'salto_termico
                         DeltaT = 0
                         KT = 0.000012
                         GoSub parametri
                         XIndex = 0
                         'fune nuda ferma : riferimento tensioni e sviluppi di posa
                         kk% = 5: xx% = 1
                         GoSub precalcsub
                         XIndex = 4
                         Svtot0 = 0
                         AEtot0 = 0
                         ATtot0 = 0
                         For j% = 1 To ns - 1
                                  'sviluppi catenarie salita
                                  Ci = Sqr(d(1, j%) ^ 2 + l(1, j%) ^ 2)
                                  Tm0(1, j%) = (Tcv(1, j%) + Tcm(1, j%)) / 2
                                  Sv0(1, j%) = Ci + s(1, j%)
                                  Svtot0 = Svtot0 + Sv0(1, j%)
                                  'allungamenti elastici salita
                                  AEtot0 = AEtot0 + Sv0(1, j%) * 10 * Tm0(1, j%) / modulo / area
                                  'allungamenti termici in salita
                                  ATtot0 = ATtot0 + KT * Sv0(1, j%) * DeltaT
                         Next j%
                         For j% = 1 To nd - 1
                                  'sviluppi catenarie discesa
                                  Ci = Sqr(d(2, j%) ^ 2 + l(2, j%) ^ 2)
                                  Tm0(2, j%) = (Tcv(2, j%) + Tcm(2, j%)) / 2
                                  Sv0(2, j%) = Ci + s(2, j%)
                                  Svtot0 = Svtot0 + Sv0(2, j%)
                                  'allungamenti elastici discesa
                                  AEtot0 = AEtot0 + Sv0(2, j%) * 10 * Tm0(2, j%) / modulo / area
                                  'allungamenti termici in salita
                                  ATtot0 = ATtot0 + KT * Sv0(2, j%) * DeltaT
                         Next j%
                         'calcolo della fune a terra
                         LRF_FUNE_A_TERRA = Svtot0 - AEtot0 - ATtot0
        End If

        If XIndex = 0 Or XIndex = 4 Or XIndex = 5 Then
            corsacil = 0
        End If

        test% = 0
        If XIndex = 2 Or XIndex = 1 Then test% = 3
        If XIndex <> 5 Then
                         GoSub eseguiver
        Else
            'tensione contrappeso +10%
            kcontrapp = 1 + Sheets("F05").Cells(17, 17) / 100
            test% = 1: GoSub eseguiver
            Ipocalc = 1: Call analisi
            'tensione contrappeso -10%
            kcontrapp = 1 - Sheets("F05").Cells(17, 17) / 100
            test% = 2: GoSub eseguiver
            Ipocalc = 3: Call analisi
        End If

        Close
        
        Call vedi_linea
        If XIndex <> 5 Then Call analisi
        
        Sheets("F05").Select
        Sheets("F05").Range("D10:I24").Select
        Selection.Copy
        Cells(1, 1).Select
        Sheets("F08").Select
        Sheets("F08").Range("G6:L20").Select
        ActiveSheet.Paste
        Cells(30, 2).Select
        Sheets("F09").Select
        Sheets("F09").Range("G6:L20").Select
        ActiveSheet.Paste
        Cells(27, 2).Select
        Sheets("F10").Select
        Sheets("F10").Range("G6:L20").Select
        ActiveSheet.Paste
        Cells(27, 2).Select
        Sheets("F11").Select
        Sheets("F11").Range("J6:O20").Select
        ActiveSheet.Paste
        Cells(27, 1).Select
        
        Sheets("F05").Cells(26, 6) = ""
        Sheets("F05").in_esecuzione.Visible = False
        'Beep
        'MsgBox ("FINE ELABORAZIONE")
        
        Exit Sub


eseguiver:
        GoSub parametri
        GoSub pulisci_geoveicoli
        
        aaa$ = "####"
        marcia$ = "AVANTI"
        If XIndex = 0 Or XIndex = 4 Then rr12 = 4
        If XIndex = 1 Then rr12 = 600
        If XIndex = 5 Then
           If test% = 1 Then
                            rr12 = 200
           Else
               rr12 = 400
           End If
        End If
        For kk% = 1 To 15
           For xx% = 1 To 6
               If SiNo%(kk%, xx%) > 0 Then
                                         cc12 = 187
                                         GoSub ciclocalcolo
               End If
           Next xx%
        Next kk%
        Close
        marcia$ = "INDIETRO"
        GoSub pulisci_geoveicoli
        If XIndex = 0 Or XIndex = 4 Then rr12 = 100
        If XIndex = 1 Then rr12 = 700
        If XIndex = 5 Then
           If test% = 1 Then
                            rr12 = 300
           Else
               rr12 = 500
           End If
        End If
        For kk% = 1 To 15
           For xx% = 2 To 6
               If SiNo%(kk%, xx%) > 0 Then
                                         cc12 = 187
                                         GoSub ciclocalcolo
               End If
           Next xx%
        Next kk%
        Return

'----------------< FINE DEL CICLO DI CALCOLO E MEMORIZZAZIONE >--------------
precalcolo:
        GoSub parametri
        aaa$ = "####"
        For zzz% = 1 To 14: For ii% = 1 To 3: corsaz(zzz%, ii%) = 0: Next ii%: Next zzz%
        'fune nuda ferma
        kk% = 5: xx% = 1: zzz% = 1: GoSub precalcsub

        'fune scarica ferma
        kk% = 2: xx% = 1: zzz% = 2: GoSub precalcsub

        'fune sal.carica/dis.scarica
        kk% = 1: xx% = 2: zzz% = 3: GoSub precalcsub

        If flagdiscesa = 1 Then
                             'fune sal.carica/dis.carica
                             kk% = 4: xx% = 2: zzz% = 4: GoSub precalcsub
        Else
            corsaz(4, 1) = corsaz(3, 1)
            corsaz(4, 2) = corsaz(3, 2)
            corsaz(4, 3) = corsaz(3, 3)
        End If
        Return

precalcsub:
        Close
        marcia$ = "AVANTI"
        kcontrapp = 1: GoSub ciclocalcolo
        corsaz(zzz%, 1) = (sviluppomax + sviluppomin) / 4
        kcontrapp = 1.1: GoSub ciclocalcolo
        corsaz(zzz%, 2) = (sviluppomax + sviluppomin) / 4
        kcontrapp = 0.9: GoSub ciclocalcolo
        corsaz(zzz%, 3) = (sviluppomax + sviluppomin) / 4
        Close
        Return

ciclocalcolo:
             If marcia$ = "AVANTI" Then test_marcia = "FORWARD GEAR" Else test_marcia = "REVERSE GEAR"
             tentativo% = 0
             If XIndex = 5 Or precalc% = 1 Then
                             Tinizio = contr * kcontrapp
             Else
                  Tinizio = contr
             End If
             nomeipotesi$ = ipotesi$(kk%): mmodo$ = modo$(xx%)
             ipoipo = (kk% - 1) * 6 + xx%
             Sheets("F05").in_esecuzione.Caption = "RUNIG PROGRAM " + " : " + test_marcia + " >" + "    Ipo: " + Format(ipoipo, "###") + "  " + nomeipotesi$ + "   " + mmodo$ + "..."
             GoSub creacalcolo
             GoSub risultati
             Return

creacalcolo:
             Do While 0 = 0
                       Select Case kk%
                                   Case 5
                                          GoSub nuda
                                   Case Is > 5
                                          ok% = 0
                                          For j% = 1 To ns - 1
                                                      PV(1, j%) = 0
                                          Next j%
                                          For j% = 1 To nd - 1
                                                      PV(2, j%) = 0
                                          Next j%
                                          'leggi carico imposto in linea ------------------------------------------
                                          'kk% = caso di carico > 5 ( i primi 5 sono automatici)
                                          'xx% = condizione di moto dll'impianto ( da 1 a 6 )
                                          'inzio riga dati carico imposto     (F06) = 12
                                          'inizio colonna dati carico imposto (F06) = 3
                                          '------------------------------------------------------------------------
                                          riga% = 11
                                          colonna% = 3 + (kk% - 6) * 2
                                          nw = Chr(10) + Chr(13)
                                          For j% = 1 To ns - 1
